title: Push SaaS releases from BASE (pipeshare.live)
description:
Platform updates cPanel on pipeshare.live can now push a published release to SaaS tenants without switching to pipeshare.net. BASE calls each URL in HP_PLATFORM_APPLY_PEER_URLS (server-to-server) which runs apply on the SaaS platform host.

Who is affected: Mike's BASE workflow on pipeshare.live. SaaS tenants receive updates when you Push from Releases after publish.
changeLog: Push to SaaS from pipeshare.live Releases (HP_PLATFORM_APPLY_PEER_URLS fan-out).
Internal POST /internal/platform/releases/apply on SaaS peers with shared secret.
canApply true on BASE when peer URLs + secret are configured.
Hybrid apply script accepts HP_DEPLOYMENT_MODE=hybrid and SAAS_WASABI_BUCKET artifacts.
